title: Gently Crisp Syrian Basmati Rice Pilaf
description: A malty, crisp, and light Syrian dish featuring basmati rice, this pilaf is a raw-friendly and flavorful side dish, served in a tagliere vessel.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large tagliere vessel over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the basmati rice and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the vegetable broth, salt, black pepper, and paprika, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes or until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender.
Fluff the rice with a fork and cook for an additional 2 minutes or until lightly crisped.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
